title: Doraemon: Nobita and the Castle of the Undersea Devil
original_title: 映画ドラえもん のび太の海底鬼岩城
overview: Nobita and his friends under the waters of the Pacific Ocean. Gian and Suneo take Doraemon's underwater vehicle and travel through the Atlantic Ocean, trying to find a treasure ship.
